notes: Minimal live `productUnpublish` mutation payload capture now succeeds against a real publication id on this host, so this parity spec executes the ready-for-comparison minimal live payload slice (`userErrors` + successful mutation execution). The publish-then-unpublish association path is covered by `product-publish-unpublish`; local aggregate field behavior remains runtime-test-backed because the standalone aggregate replay does not set up the captured pre-unpublish publication state.
